title: Fix SSH key file permissions after generation

comments.author: m1--full-system-adversarial-review
comments.content: Plan: Add explicit chmod 700 on keys_dir and chmod 600 on private key after ssh-keygen runs, using cfg(unix) guard. Also create a GitHub issue for the broader key isolation design goal.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether
comments.content: Completed: commit 41d8b57 — restrictive Unix permissions on SSH keys
